full_text:
Zhang Long 張龍
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Long (張龍). He and Zhang Bao changed sides, they took part in Guo Si’s secret attack but it failed. Zhang Long was affiliated with Li Jue and Guo Si.
